data.caption:
Everything we did this year was for His glory. Looking back at our 2025 journey from the quiet moments of Young Adult Sabbath to the high energy of GYC, we are just so incredibly thankful for how the Lord has led us.

He provided the strength for our hikes, the joy in our socials, and the spiritual growth in our hearts. We give Him all the praise for the community He has built here. 🤍

This past weekend a few of us got to attend GYC and experience what it means to See the Invisible. It was such an amazing blessing, reminding ourselves to always rely on God, even when we can’t see Him. The atmosphere at GYC is a blessing, and you really do feel the presence of the Holy Spirit there. From the worships to the praise in the prayer room.

There’s nothing like good food and deep conversation to bring people together. ❤️ From a packed potluck table to a room full of games and fellowship, last night was all about connection. 🗣️ We ended the Sabbath with a special worship set, tracing the gifts of the Wise Men back to the true Reason for the season. Grateful to be living life On Purpose with this group. Calhoun Young Adults, you guys are the best! ✨🎸
#OnPurpose #CalhounGA #YoungAdults #ChristmasWorship

We spent the weekend at the @gccuthya Young Adult Life Retreat unpacking the story of the Rich Young Ruler and what it truly means to "Walk His Way." It’s easy to get comfortable in our current situation, but Pastor Albert reminded us of the precarity of a life without God.

The call wasn't just to give things up, but to shift our priority, letting go of the world so we can walk in proximity to Jesus.

Honestly, it was a spirit-filled reset. From the worship to the bonfire, I’m just grateful for this community and the chance to refocus together.

#OnPurpose #WalkHisWay #YoungAdults
Join us weekly for Sabbath School! 10:10am - 10:50am! Located in the right side of God's Pantry, 1411 Rome Rd SW, Calhoun, GA.

We had an amazing time joining @interlinkyoungadultministry and other young adults for their 4th Annual Hike at Vogel State Park! Centered around the theme “Your Testimony,” the day was filled with connection, laughter, and worship led by @uicgram as we celebrated how God moves through each of our stories. 🌲🙌
#OnPurposeYA #YourTestimony #YoungAdultMinistry #YoungProfessionals #VogelStatePark #InterlinkYA
